instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Lei Wilson and your zip code is 32255. You are confident, organized, creative, impatient. You received a laptop and you want to exchange it to i7 processor, 8GB, 1TB SSD. If the agent asks for which laptop, it is 15-inch, 32GB.

hints.hint: I want the replacement to have an i7 processor
The new laptop should have 8GB RAM
It should also come with a 1TB SSD
